title: R.S. 13:3479 through 13:3481 not to affect other methods of process against non-residents
doc_html:
§3482.  R.S. 13:3479 through 13:3481 not to affect other methods of process against non-residents

Nothing in R.S. 13:3479 through 13:3481 shall be construed as affecting other methods of process against non-residents as now provided by existing laws.
doc_text:
§3482.  R.S. 13:3479 through 13:3481 not to affect other methods of process against non-residents
Nothing in R.S. 13:3479 through 13:3481 shall be construed as affecting other methods of process against non-residents as now provided by existing laws.
